creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately I had to revert this commit -- it appears that the value
of MAIL_GID is a matter for debate, and rather than cause suffering
for many of the current users I've chosen to leave the MAIL_GID value
as-is.

Refer to the later stages of ports/157868 -- I really made a mess here!

People can override it in make.conf anyway.

Chris
